item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-05)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 40642 Trending skills: 15799 Hot skills: 3974 Top All Time: find-skills (413683) Top Trending: agent-tools (15040) Top Hot: optimize-for-ai (108)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): optimize-for-ai
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 108 Source: calm-north/seojuice-skills Description: Optimize content for AI search engines — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Google AI Overviews. Use when the user asks about AI SEO, AISO, getting cited by AI, appearing in AI answers, answer engine optimization, AEO, GEO, LLMO, AI Overviews, zero-click search, or how to appear in ChatGPT/Perplexity results. For traditional SEO, see diagnose-seo.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): adapt
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 57 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Adapt designs to work across different screen sizes, devices, contexts, or platforms. Ensures consistent experience across varied environments.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): bolder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 57 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Amplify safe or boring designs to make them more visually interesting and stimulating. Increases impact while maintaining usability.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): audit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 57 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Perform comprehensive audit of interface quality across accessibility, performance, theming, and responsive design. Generates detailed report of issues with severity ratings and recommendations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): mcp-apps-builder
item.description:
New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 57 Source: mcp-use/mcp-use Description: **MANDATORY for ALL MCP server work** - mcp-use framework best practices and patterns.
**READ THIS FIRST** before any MCP server work, including: - Creating new MCP servers - Modifying existing MCP servers (adding/updating tools, resources, prompts, widgets) - Debugging MCP server issues or errors - Reviewing MCP server code for quality, security, or performance - Answering questions about MCP development or mcp-use patterns - Making ANY changes to server.tool(), server.resource(), server.prompt(), or widgets
This skill contains critical architecture decisions, security patterns, and common pitfalls. Always consult the relevant reference files BEFORE implementing MCP features.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): delight
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 57 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add moments of joy, personality, and unexpected touches that make interfaces memorable and enjoyable to use. Elevates functional to delightful.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): colorize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 57 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add strategic color to features that are too monochromatic or lack visual interest. Makes interfaces more engaging and expressive.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): clarify
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 57 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve unclear UX copy, error messages, microcopy, labels, and instructions. Makes interfaces easier to understand and use.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): chatgpt-app-builder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 57 Source: mcp-use/mcp-use Description: Build ChatGPT apps with interactive widgets using mcp-use and OpenAI Apps SDK. Use when creating ChatGPT apps, building MCP servers with widgets, defining React widgets, working with Apps SDK, or when user mentions ChatGPT widgets, mcp-use widgets, or Apps SDK development.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): critique
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 57 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Evaluate design effectiveness from a UX perspective. Assesses visual hierarchy, information architecture, emotional resonance, and overall design quality with actionable feedback.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): animate
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 56 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Review a feature and enhance it with purposeful animations, micro-interactions, and motion effects that improve usability and delight.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): build-links
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 105 Source: calm-north/seojuice-skills Description: Design a link building campaign with prospect identification, asset creation, and outreach strategy. Use when the user asks about link building, backlinks, domain authority, how to get backlinks, outreach campaigns, digital PR, guest posting, or link acquisition. For internal linking, see fix-linking.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): polish
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 56 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Final quality pass before shipping. Fixes alignment, spacing, consistency, and detail issues that separate good from great.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 56 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): extract
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 56 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Extract and consolidate reusable components, design tokens, and patterns into your design system. Identifies opportunities for systematic reuse and enriches your component library.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): normalize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 56 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Normalize design to match your design system and ensure consistency

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): distill
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 56 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Strip designs to their essence by removing unnecessary complexity. Great design is simple, powerful, and clean.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): onboard
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 56 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Design or improve onboarding flows, empty states, and first-time user experiences. Helps users get started successfully and understand value quickly.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): optimize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 56 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve interface performance across loading speed, rendering, animations, images, and bundle size. Makes experiences faster and smoother.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): quieter
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 55 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Tone down overly bold or visually aggressive designs. Reduces intensity while maintaining design quality and impact.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): harden
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 55 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve interface resilience through better error handling, i18n support, text overflow handling, and edge case management. Makes interfaces robust and production-ready.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): teach-impeccable
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 55 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: One-time setup that gathers design context for your project and saves it to your AI config file. Run once to establish persistent design guidelines.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): audit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 104 Source: calm-north/seojuice-skills Description: Run a comprehensive SEO audit on a website covering technical health, on-page optimization, content quality, and backlink profile. Use when the user asks for an SEO audit, site review, SEO health check, "what's wrong with my SEO", website analysis, or a full diagnostic of their site's search performance. For speed-specific issues, see audit-speed. For technical crawl/index issues only, see diagnose-seo.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 187 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 134 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): gws-gmail
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 46 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Send, read, and manage email.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): gws-drive
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 45 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Drive: Manage files, folders, and shared drives.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): gws-calendar
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 43 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Calendar: Manage calendars and events.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): gws-gmail-triage
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 41 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Show unread inbox summary (sender, subject, date).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): gws-sheets
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 39 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Sheets: Read and write spreadsheets.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): gws-docs
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 39 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Read and write Google Docs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): gws-calendar-agenda
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 38 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Calendar: Show upcoming events across all calendars.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): fun-brainstorming
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 96 Source: roin-orca/skills Description: Invoke before any creative or architectural work — feature design, component creation, or behavioral changes. A streamlined brainstorming process optimized for fast, focused decision-making.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): gws-calendar-insert
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 38 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Calendar: Create a new event.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): gws-gmail-send
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 37 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Send an email.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): gws-gmail-watch
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 37 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Watch for new emails and stream them as NDJSON.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): gws-drive-upload
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 37 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Drive: Upload a file with automatic metadata.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): gws-slides
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 36 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Slides: Read and write presentations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): gws-docs-write
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 36 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Docs: Append text to a document.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): recover-content
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 35 Source: calm-north/seojuice-skills Description: Diagnose and reverse traffic loss on existing pages. Use when the user asks about content decay, pages losing traffic, declining rankings, traffic drops, why a page stopped ranking, content refresh strategy, or when to consolidate vs redirect old content. For creating new content, see brief.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): gws-sheets-read
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 35 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Sheets: Read values from a spreadsheet.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): gws-sheets-append
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 35 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Sheets: Append a row to a spreadsheet.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): diagnose-seo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 34 Source: calm-north/seojuice-skills Description: Structured diagnostic for technical SEO problems. Use when the user asks about crawl issues, indexation problems, why pages aren't being indexed, robots.txt questions, canonical errors, sitemap issues, rendering problems, or general technical SEO troubleshooting. For Core Web Vitals and page speed, see audit-speed.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): find-keywords
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 92 Source: calm-north/seojuice-skills Description: Build a prioritized keyword list for a website, topic, or campaign. Use when the user asks about keyword research, finding keywords to target, building a keyword list, search demand, keyword difficulty, intent mapping, or which keywords to prioritize. For writing content around keywords, see brief. For grouping keywords into clusters, see build-clusters.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): azure-pricing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 33 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Fetches real-time Azure retail pricing using the Azure Retail Prices API (prices.azure.com) and estimates Copilot Studio agent credit consumption. Use when the user asks about the cost of any Azure service, wants to compare SKU prices, needs pricing data for a cost estimate, mentions Azure pricing, Azure costs, Azure billing, or asks about Copilot Studio pricing, Copilot Credits, or agent usage estimation. Covers compute, storage, networking, databases, AI, Copilot Studio, and all other Azure service families.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): brief
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 79 Source: calm-north/seojuice-skills Description: Produce an editor-ready content brief for a target keyword or topic. Use when the user asks for a content brief, writing guidelines, article outline, SEO brief, what to include in a blog post, or how to structure content for a keyword. For choosing which topics to write about, see find-keywords. For a full site-wide SEO audit, see audit.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): find-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 717 Source: vercel-labs/skills Description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): seedance-prompter
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 62 Source: pexoai/pexo-skills Description: Expert prompt engineering for Seedance 2.0. Use when the user wants to generate a video with multimodal assets (images, videos, audio) and needs the best possible prompt.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): mcp-builder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 58 Source: mcp-use/mcp-use Description: Build Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers with mcp-use framework. Use when creating MCP servers, defining tools/resources/prompts, working with mcp-use, bootstrapping MCP projects, or when user mentions MCP development, tools, resources, or prompts.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#50): planner
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 1431 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create comprehensive, phased implementation plans with sprints and atomic tasks. Use when user says: "make a plan", "create a plan", "plan this out", "plan the implementation", "help me plan", "design a plan", "draft a plan", "write a plan", "outline the steps", "break this down into tasks", "what's the plan for", or any similar planning request. Also triggers on explicit "/planner" or "/plan" commands.
